channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Christina Applegate Invites Others with MS to Share “the Good, the Bad, the Ugly…the Diapers” Through New Online Platform
item.description: The actress, whose new memoir is out next month, jokes that she rates the disease "zero stars," adding, "Would not recommend"

item.title: Scout Willis Opens the Doors to Her ‘Sensual’ L.A. Home Where She Wants Guests to Come Over and ‘Make Out’
item.description: The singer — and daughter of Demi Moore and Bruce Willis— gave ‘Architectural Digest’ a tour of her Hollywood cottage

item.title: Catherine O’Hara’s Cause of Death Confirmed, Comedy Legend Privately Faced Rectal Cancer: Medical Examiner
item.description: The comedy legend died at the age of 71 on Jan. 30

item.title: Jennifer Hudson Wishes Kelly Clarkson the 'Absolute Best' After She Announces End to “The Kelly Clarkson Show”
item.description: The fellow talk-show host and 'American Idol' alum sounded off about Clarkson's show coming to an end

item.title: Nancy Guthrie Ransom Note Asks for 2 Different Multi-Million Dollar Sums That Haven't Been Paid, One With Monday Deadline
item.description: The apparent ransom note demanded $4 million in bitcoin by Thursday, Feb. 5 — increasing to $6 million by Monday, Feb. 9 if the demand was not met, so...

item.title: TMZ Comedy Crawl Tour Keeps Laughs Rolling Through Hollywood
item.description: The TMZ Comedy Crawl returned Friday night and did not disappoint! The rolling comedy experience was back in full swing with returning host Mateen Ste...

item.title: TMZ Sports Streaming Live From Newsroom, Join The Conversation!
item.description: TMZ Sports is going live from the newsroom to discuss the day's biggest stories ... but we don't just want folks to watch and enjoy the conversation, ...

item.title: Cardi B and Stefon Diggs Unfollow Each Other on Instagram, Spark Split Rumors
item.description: Cardi B and Stefon Diggs could be dealing with some trouble in paradise ... at least that’s what fans think after the two unfollowed each other on Ins...

item.title: Sexy Stars Eating Pizza For Pizza Day!
item.description: No deep-dish drama here ... just smiles, slices and hot shots that'll melt your heart out! It's Pizza Day, and we've got more than enough to share ......

item.title: Savannah Guthrie Believes Mother Nancy Is Still Alive, 'We Need Your Help'
item.description: Savannah Guthrie and her family are not giving up hope Nancy Guthrie is alive ... but she's desperately asking for the public's help in locating their...
